title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Zerodha

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Zerodha
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Zerodha in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Zerodha:
Zerodha is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zerodha!
